name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusionN ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES proc, state



TypeOK == /\ proc \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [proc -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == /\ proc = 1..N
        /\ state = [p \in proc |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "trying"]
          /\ proc' = CHOOSE p \in proc : state[p] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "critical"]
          /\ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![proc] = "idle"]
        \/ proc' = proc
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<proc, state>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit(N) ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, votes, messages

Prepare = [msg |-> "Prepare", to |-> participants, from |-> coordinator]
VoteYes = [msg |-> "VoteYes", to |-> coordinator, from |-> participants]
VoteNo = [msg |-> "VoteNo", to |-> coordinator, from |-> participants]
Commit = [msg |-> "Commit", to |-> participants, from |-> coordinator]
Abort = [msg |-> "Abort", to |-> participants, from |-> coordinator]

Init == 
  /\ participants = 1..N
  /\ coordinator = 0
  /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "Init"]
  /\ votes = [i \in participants |-> "None"]
  /\ messages = <<Prepare>>

Next == 
  \/ /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "Init"]
     /\ messages = <<Prepare>>
     /\ state' = [i \in participants |-> "Prepared"]
     /\ messages' = <<VoteYes, VoteNo>>  (* Simplified: all participants vote yes or no *)
  \/ /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "Prepared"]
     /\ messages = <<VoteYes, VoteNo>>
     /\ state' = [i \in participants |-> "Committed"]
     /\ messages' = <<Commit>>
  \/ /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "Committed"]
     /\ messages = <<Commit>>
     /\ state' = state
     /\ messages' = <<Abort>>
  \/ /\ state = [i \in participants |-> "Committed"]
     /\ messages = <<Abort>>
     /\ state' = state
     /\ messages' = messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, votes, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks are represented as a set of philosophers who currently hold them *)
Init == 
  forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN] /\ 
  state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}] /\ 
  \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = FALSE /\ state[i] = "thinking"

(* Helper functions to determine if a philosopher can eat *)
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

canEat(i) == state[i] = "hungry" /\ ~forks[left(i)] /\ ~forks[right(i)]

(* Actions for each philosopher *)
takeForks(i) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = TRUE, ![right(i)] = TRUE]

putForks(i) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![left(i)] = FALSE, ![right(i)] = FALSE]

(* Transition relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \E action \in {takeForks, putForks} :
      action(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

TypeOK == /\ q \in [1..K -> Nat]
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Enqueue(x) == /\ size < K
             /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = x]
             /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
             /\ size' = size + 1
             /\ head' = head

Dequeue == /\ size > 0
          /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
          /\ tail' = tail

Next == \/ /\ size < K
          /\ Enqueue(1)
        \/ /\ size > 0
          /\ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>> /\ TypeOK

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Follower"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
          /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
        \/ \E s \in Server:
          /\ state[s] = "Leader"
          /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
          /\ votedFor' = votedFor
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Process

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, recorded, markerSent

Init == /\ state = [p \in Process |-> "active"]
        /\ channel = [p \in Process, q \in Process |-> <<>>]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Process |-> <<>>]
        /\ recorded = [p \in Process |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerSent = [p \in Process, q \in Process |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
          /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = Append(snapshot[p], state[p])]
          /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = Append(channelp..q, "marker")]
          /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !p..q = TRUE]
        \/ /\ state' = state
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
          /\ recorded' = recorded
          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
          /\ \E p \in Process : \E q \in Process :
                /\ channelp..q /= <<>>
                /\ channelp..q[1] = "marker"
                /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = Tail(channelp..q)]
                /\ IF recorded[p] = FALSE THEN
                       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
                       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = <<>>]
                       /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
                       /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT !q..p = TRUE]

                       /\ state' = state
                       /\ snapshot' = snapshot
                       /\ recorded' = recorded
                       /\ markerSent' = markerSent
        \/ /\ state' = state
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
          /\ recorded' = recorded
          /\ markerSent' = markerSent
          /\ \E p \in Process : \E q \in Process :
                /\ channelp..q /= <<>>
                /\ channelp..q[1] /= "marker"
                /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = Tail(channelp..q)]
                /\ IF recorded[p] = TRUE /\ markerSentq..p = FALSE THEN
                       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = Append(snapshot[p], channelp..q[1])]

                       /\ snapshot' = snapshot

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, snapshot, recorded, markerSent>>[]

====

EXTENDS Integers, FiniteSets

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES ballot, accept, chosen

Init == ballot = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ accept = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ chosen = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]

Next == \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
  /\ ballot' = [ballot EXCEPT ![b] = b]
  /\ accept' = [accept EXCEPT ![b] = v]
  /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![p] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, accept, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries, Timeout
VARIABLES acked, retransmits, sent, timer

    /\ chunks = SubSeq(File, 1, ChunkSize) \* Divide file into chunks
    /\ sent = {} \* No chunks have been sent yet
    /\ acked = {} \* No chunks have been acknowledged yet
    /\ retransmits = [i \in 1..Len(chunks) |-> 0] \* No retransmissions yet
    /\ timer = 0 \* No retransmission timeout yet

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sent \* Chunk i has not been sent yet
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {i} \* Mark chunk i as sent
        /\ acked' = acked \* No new acknowledgments yet
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits \* No retransmission yet
        /\ timer' = Timeout \* Reset retransmission timer
    \/ \E i \in sent \setminus acked :
        /\ i \notin sent \* Chunk i has not been sent yet
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {i} \* Mark chunk i as sent
        /\ acked' = acked \* No new acknowledgments yet
        /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![i] = retransmits[i] + 1] \* Increment retransmission count for chunk i
        /\ timer' = Timeout \* Reset retransmission timer
    \/ \E i \in sent \setminus acked :
        /\ i \in sent \* Chunk i has been sent
        /\ acked' = acked \cup {i} \* Mark chunk i as acknowledged
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits \* No retransmission yet
        /\ timer' = 0 \* No retransmission timeout yet
    \/ timer > 0 \* Retransmission timeout has not expired yet
        /\ timer' = timer - 1 \* Decrement retransmission timer
        /\ sent' = sent \* No new chunks have been sent yet
        /\ acked' = acked \* No new acknowledgments yet
        /\ retransmits' = retransmits \* No retransmission yet

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<chunks, sent, acked, retransmits, timer>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(File))
    /\ sent \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ acked \in SUBSET 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ retransmits \in [1..Len(chunks) -> Nat]
    /\ timer \in Nat

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC
CONSTANTS DB, FiniteSet, Id, Txns

VARIABLES data, txns, nextTxId, writeSet, writes


  txns = {};    (* set of active transaction ids *)
  nextTxId = 0; (* next transaction id to use *)

define
  (* Record is a sequence of values *)
  Record == Seq(Int)

  (* Database is a sequence of records *)
  DB == Seq(Record)

  (* Transaction is a record with fields:
     - id: transaction id
     - snapshot: snapshot of the database at transaction start
     - writes: set of record ids written by the transaction
     - writeSet: mapping from record id to new record value
  *)
  Transaction == [id: Int, snapshot: DB, writes: Set(Int), writeSet: [Int -> Record]]

  (* Next transaction id *)
  NextTxId == nextTxId

  (* Active transactions *)
  Txns == txns

  (* Database *)
  Data == data

  (* Begin a new transaction *)

    LET newTxId == NextTxId
    IN  /\ nextTxId' = newTxId + 1
        /\ txns' = Txns \cup {newTxId}
        /\ data' = Data
        /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>

  (* Commit a transaction *)
  Commit(txId) == 
    LET writes == Txns[txId].writes
        writeSet == Txns[txId].writeSet
    IN  /\ txns' = Txns \ {txId}
        /\ data' = [i \in 1..Len(Data) |-> IF i \in writes THEN writeSet[i] ELSE Data[i]]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>

  (* Abort a transaction *)
  Abort(txId) == 
    /\ txns' = Txns \ {txId}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>

  (* Read a record *)
  Read(txId, recordId) == 
    IF recordId \in Txns[txId].writes THEN Txns[txId].writeSet[recordId]


  (* Write a record *)
  Write(txId, recordId, newRecord) == 
    /\ Txns[txId].writes' = Txns[txId].writes \cup {recordId}
    /\ Txns[txId].writeSet' = Txns[txId].writeSet \cup [recordId -> newRecord]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>
*)
  (* Record is a sequence of values *)
  Record == Seq(Int)

  (* Database is a sequence of records *)
  DB == Seq(Record)

  (* Transaction is a record with fields:
     - id: transaction id
     - snapshot: snapshot of the database at transaction start
     - writes: set of record ids written by the transaction
     - writeSet: mapping from record id to new record value
  *)
  Transaction == [id: Int, snapshot: DB, writes: Set(Int), writeSet: [Int -> Record]]

  (* Next transaction id *)
  NextTxId == nextTxId

  (* Active transactions *)
  Txns == txns

  (* Database *)
  Data == data

  (* Begin a new transaction *)

    LET newTxId == NextTxId
    IN  /\ nextTxId' = newTxId + 1
        /\ txns' = Txns \cup {newTxId}
        /\ data' = Data
        /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>

  (* Commit a transaction *)
  Commit(txId) == 
    LET writes == Txns[txId].writes
        writeSet == Txns[txId].writeSet
    IN  /\ txns' = Txns \ {txId}
        /\ data' = [i \in 1..Len(Data) |-> IF i \in writes THEN writeSet[i] ELSE Data[i]]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>

  (* Abort a transaction *)
  Abort(txId) == 
    /\ txns' = Txns \ {txId}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>

  (* Read a record *)
  Read(txId, recordId) == 
    IF recordId \in Txns[txId].writes THEN Txns[txId].writeSet[recordId]


  (* Write a record *)
  Write(txId, recordId, newRecord) == 
    /\ Txns[txId].writes' = Txns[txId].writes \cup {recordId}
    /\ Txns[txId].writeSet' = Txns[txId].writeSet \cup [recordId -> newRecord]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<snapshot, writes, writeSet>>
*)
Init == 
  /\ data = <<>> 
  /\ txns = {} 
  /\ nextTxId = 0

Next == 
  \/ \E txId \in Txns: Commit(txId)
  \/ \E txId \in Txns: Abort(txId)
  \/ Begin

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, nextTxId>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ data \in DB
  /\ txns \in FiniteSet(Int)
  /\ nextTxId \in Int

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED turn
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, T

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j \in 1..N : infected[j]}]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        \/ \E i, j \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup {j}]
          /\ infected' = infected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Allocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == 
  /\ free = Pages
  /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == 
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in free :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        /\ free' = free \ {p}
  \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in allocated[c] :
        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
        /\ free' = free \cup {p}
  \/ free' = free
      /\ allocated' = allocated

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

TypeOK == 
  /\ free \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
  /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients : c1 /= c2 => allocated[c1] # allocated[c2]

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId

Init == 
  /\ subscribers = << >>
  /\ messages = << >>
  /\ nextMsgId = 1

Next == 
  /\ subscribers' = subscribers
  /\ messages' = messages
  /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = FALSE
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
        /\ wants[1] = TRUE
        /\ turn' = turn
        /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![turn] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E delta \in Nat :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [counts[n] EXCEPT ![n] = counts[n][n] + delta]]
          /\ \A m \in Node : m /= n => counts'[m] = counts[m]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] \in [Node -> Nat]

====
